name: Elite School Bus Co LLC
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (non-HM); private passenger / school bus
fmcsa_status: ACTIVE (USDOT); Not Authorized for interstate for-hire
entity_status: active (operating); Chapter 11 bankruptcy filed 2025-02-25 (Case 1:25-bk-11526, D. Md.)
registry_source: Maryland SDAT (Business Express) — not directly retrieved; bankruptcy via PACER/BKAlerts
notes: Input address 'Joseph Biggs Memorial Hwy, North East, MD 21901' matches a secondary/company yard reported by directories (2399 Joseph Biggs Memorial Hwy, North East, MD); SAFER physical address is the 511 Conowingo Rd HQ (~7 miles south). Same Cecil County operator. Filed Chapter 11 in U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the District of Maryland on Feb 25, 2025 (Judge David E. Rice); represented by Tydings & Rosenberg. Listed as bus contractor for Cecil County Public Schools. MCS-150 filed 03/12/2026 — still operating.

name: Harlows School Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division — search UI requires direct interaction; no entity directly retrieved
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier found matching 'Harlows School Bus' at a Westford, MA / 5 Technology Park Dr address. SAFER keyword searches on HARLOW, HARLOWS, and HARLOWS SCHOOL returned no Massachusetts records. The two real 'Harlow's' bus carriers in SAFER are both ND-based (USDOT 1662560 HARLOWS SCHOOL BUS SERVICE INC, 401 power units, Bismarck ND; and USDOT 321336 HARLOW'S BUS SERVICE INC, 12 power units, Bismarck ND); neither operates in MA per company website (operates only in ND, SD, MT, ID, WA). 5 Technology Park Dr is a commercial office park in Westford, not a bus yard. Likely a registration/source-list anomaly: either a misclassified/mislabeled entry in the source list, a defunct/dissolved Massachusetts entity, or the listed HQ is a 3rd-party registered-agent or virtual-office address rather than an operating bus depot. No active match could be confirmed via FMCSA or open sources.

name: Board Bus LLC
registry_source: Maryland SDAT (Business Express) — search UI requires direct interaction; no entity directly retrieved

name: DLM School Bus Line Inc
officers: Shaquita Johnson (President, of Ford Heights); Madelyn Drake (Secretary, owner per family statement); Henry Drake (associated, denies financial interest)
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State — Business Services Corp/LLC search (apps.ilsos.gov); officer info also sourced from Chicago Heights Patch reporting citing IL SOS filing
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found for 'DLM SCHOOL BUS LINE' or 'DLM SCHOOL' (SAFER keyword search returned 'no records matching'). Only DLM-named carriers in SAFER are DLM (Laredo, TX, USDOT 2551370) and DLM TRANSPORTATION LLC (Dallas, TX, USDOT 3893008, Out-of-Service 07/23/2025) — neither matches Chicago Heights, IL. DLM operates intrastate-only school bus routes in IL and may not be USDOT-registered (school bus contractors operating wholly intrastate without interstate trips can be exempt; Illinois has its own school bus permit regime via Sec. of State). Company has been in operation since 1999 per multiple business directories. Contracts confirmed with Ford Heights District 169, Chicago Heights District 170, and Steger District 194. Annual revenue est. $1-2.5M, ~10-19 employees per D&B. Address per source list (137 E 17th St, Chicago Heights) matches Yellowpages/Superpages; other directories list 1901 E End Ave and 3011 E End Ave (yard locations).

name: City Wide Bus Co Inc
inc_date: 1988-01-01 (per BBB business start date; SDAT incorporation date not directly retrieved)
registry_source: Maryland SDAT (Business Express) — not directly retrieved; ownership/start-date data via BBB Baltimore profile
notes: SAFER address (2505 Aisquith St, Baltimore, MD 21218) is an exact match to input address. Operates school transportation, charter, and party bus services. 3 vehicle inspections in past 24 months with zero out-of-service violations; 2 crashes (1 injury, 1 tow-away). MCS-150 filed Jan 6, 2026 — current. BBB profile opened 12/7/2008; business reported as started 1/1/1988.
